name: create_chat_completion
description: Generate a chat completion response given a conversation history of messages. Supports all open-source chat models hosted on Together AI including Llama, Mistral, Qwen, and DeepSeek with streaming, tool calling, and JSON mode.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID to use for the completion (e.g. 'meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct-Turbo').

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: An array of message objects representing the conversation history. Each message has a 'role' (system, user, assistant) and 'content' (string).

example.content: What is the capital of France?

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 2. Higher values make output more random.

parameters.name: top_p
parameters.description: Nucleus sampling parameter. Only tokens with cumulative probability up to top_p are considered.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: If true, partial message deltas are sent as server-sent events.

parameters.name: stop
parameters.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

messages.content: What is the capital of France?

message.content: The capital of France is Paris.
